pattern: Each mirrored pair contributes independently to any candidate target difference X, and the number of changes it needs for a given X only takes three possible values -- so sweeping X once with a difference array finds the best choice for the whole array at once.
hints: Pair up index i with index n-1-i; for a fixed target difference X, that pair needs 0 changes if it already differs by X, and otherwise needs 1 change whenever a single value in [0, k] can be adjusted to make the difference X, or 2 changes if neither side alone can reach it.
For a pair (a, b), the largest X for which changing just one of them still works out to max(a, k-a, b, k-b): below or at that threshold one change suffices, above it both must change.

Use a difference array over X in [0, k]: add a range +1 saving (from 2 down to 1) for every X up to that pair's threshold, add one more point saving exactly at X = |a-b| (0 instead of 1), then scan prefix sums once to find the X with the largest total saving.

edge_inputs.description: k is zero, every value is pinned to zero
every pair already shares the same difference
pairs with wildly different natural gaps

stress.description: random even-length arrays with random k
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    half = max(1, min(size, 50000) // 2)
    n = 2 * half
    k = rng.randint(0, 100000)
    nums = [rng.randint(0, k) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums, k]
stress.note: n scales up to the real constraint

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def minChanges(self, nums, k):
        n = len(nums)
        m = n // 2
        diff = [0] * (k + 2)
        delta_cnt = [0] * (k + 1)
        for i in range(m):
            a = nums[i]
            b = nums[n - 1 - i]
            delta = abs(a - b)
            M = max(a, k - a, b, k - b)
            diff[0] += 1
            diff[min(M, k) + 1] -= 1
            delta_cnt[delta] += 1
        best = None
        acc = 0
        for x in range(k + 1):
            acc += diff[x]
            discount = acc + delta_cnt[x]
            cost = 2 * m - discount
            if best is None or cost < best:
                best = cost
        return best
